category_title: Disengaged students who exhibit off-task behaviors like iPad gaming and copying peers when frustrated
scenario_title: Informal iPad assessment with challenging academic vocabulary
minimal_context: The student is taking an informal science assessment on their iPad in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your iPads and start working on the informal science assessment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Some of these questions were hard for me ’cuz I didn’t—like biodiversity, I didn’t know what it meant.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just think about it and try your best to answer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I try to remember. But if I can’t ‘Google’ the answer then I just don’t do it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to finish the questions on your screen.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Switches to playing a game on the iPad) I usually just wait for the answer. (Turns to peer) Hey, what did you put for this one?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your iPads and start working on the informal science assessment.

STUDENT: Some of these questions were hard for me ’cuz I didn’t—like biodiversity, I didn’t know what it meant.

TUTOR: Just think about it and try your best to answer.

STUDENT: I try to remember. But if I can’t ‘Google’ the answer then I just don’t do it.

TUTOR: You need to finish the questions on your screen.

STUDENT: (Switches to playing a game on the iPad) I usually just wait for the answer. (Turns to peer) Hey, what did you put for this one?

task.content: Taking an informal assessment on their iPads

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Responding to challenging science content where they didn't know what academic vocabulary like biodiversity meant
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Playing a game on the iPad, talking to other students during instruction
related_quotes: Some of these questions were hard for me ’cuz I didn’t—like biodiversity, I didn’t know what it meant.
If I can’t ‘Google’ the answer then I just don’t do it.

behavior_patterns.condition: When it came to understanding the science material
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: I usually just wait for the answer
related_quotes: I try to remember. I usually just wait for the answer.
